title: Artist Manifest
description: Canonical published JSON manifest for an artist / brand persona in the Jubilujah catalog (Build Spec sections 6, 7, 16). One record per persona or branded act regardless of grouping.

$schema.description: Optional self-link to this schema document.

slug.description: URL-safe artist slug. Also used as the manifest filename: /catalog/artists/{slug}.json.

grouping.description: Taxonomy bucket per Build Spec section 6. Drives the 12-song lock on albums, the catalog browse ordering, and downstream consumer treatments.

primary.description: Biography body in the persona's primary language.

primary_language.description: ISO 639-1 code identifying which language 'primary' is written in.

translations.description: Map of ISO 639-1 codes to translated biography bodies.

visual_identity.description: References to visual identity assets on the CDN (avatars, color palette, typography hints).

avatar_url.description: Absolute URL of the largest delivered avatar rendition.

avatar_renditions.description: Map of size keys (e.g. '128', '256', '512') to absolute URLs of size-specific WebP renditions.

primary_color.description: Hex color (with leading #) used as the dominant brand accent.

secondary_color.description: Hex color used as the supporting brand accent.

wordmark_url.description: Optional logotype / wordmark asset URL on the CDN.

five_fold_office.description: Five-Fold ministry dual-office assignment. Required for Inspire Family personas; optional for other groupings. The 'secondary' role represents the secondary anointing in the dual-office model.

genre_anchor.description: Primary genre / sonic anchor tags for the persona. Drives station persona_affinity in Jubilee Radio.

ohi_default.description: Whether OHI is this persona's default content mode. CCI override is internal-only and never serialized to public JSON (Build Spec sections 7, 20). Public consumers should always treat this as true unless explicitly told otherwise; this field exists for completeness of the published artist record.

album_count.description: Convenience count of published albums for this artist. Recomputed on every publish.
